subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Chitengi alihamikanga ngwenyi keshi ikhiye ambatanga maliko.
topics: Mulongeshi alumbunune chihandwa chili hamikuku ya hanjikilo na ambulwilo.
Vinoma: Mapepa amikuku yamu ambulwilo, mikanda.
